word: G3843 - πάντως - pántōs - pan'-toce - By all means

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάντως

- Transliteration: Pantos

- Phonetic: pan'-toce

- Definition:

1. altogether

a. in any and every way, by all means

b. doubtless, surely, certainly

c. in no wise, not at all

- Origin: from G3956

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G3956; entirely; specifically at all events (with negative following) in no event: - by all means altogether at all needs no doubt in [no] wise surely.
